# CWE-212 negative: PAN cleared before marshaling export
lang: go
file: CWE-212-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

type paymentRecord struct {
	Customer string `json:"customer"`
	Card     string `json:"card"`
}

type paymentExport struct {
	Customer string `json:"customer"`
}

// CWE-212 Improper Removal of Sensitive Information Before Storage or Transfer (mitigated)
func ExportPayments(c *gin.Context, rows []paymentRecord) {
	out := make([]paymentExport, 0, len(rows))
	for _, row := range rows {
		out = append(out, paymentExport{Customer: row.Customer})
	}
	payload, err := json.Marshal(out)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "encode"})
		return
	}
	c.Data(http.StatusOK, "application/json", payload)
}
